description: This captivating email template is perfect for ringing in the Lunar New Year while also promoting beauty and personal care products. Designed specifically for 2021, it's ideal for launching new skincare products or offering event-related promotions during the Chinese New Year celebrations. The template beautifully merges the spirit of the season with enticing visuals of cosmetics, making it a great tactic for any beauty brand looking to capitalize on the festive mood. It's a wonderful way to wish your customers a prosperous New Year while also enticing them with your latest offerings. Suitable for seasonal promotions during New Year and Chinese New Year.
short_description: Start 2021 with our vibrant email template, perfect for Chinese New Year or event promotions in Beauty & Personal Care. Showcase cosmetics and skin products effectively for product launches or seasonal promotions. Let customers celebrate the Lunar Year and explore your range.

designer.description: I'm a Product Designer passionate about creating meaningful, relevant and inclusive solutions for people.
